sub_modules.conv1d_tap_products: Purely combinational hardcoded 5-tap coefficient multiplier stage for kernel [2, 8, 12, 8, 2].
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Purely combinational five-input adder that forms the full-width multiply-accumulate sum.
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Purely combinational normalization stage that right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W and truncates to the output width.
